apihelp-query+pageassessments-summary: Soo celi mashruucyada iyo qiimeynta la xiriira bogagga la siiyay.
apihelp-query+pageassessments-param-limi: Xadka tirada guud ee mashruucyada la soo celinayo (wadarta dhammaan bogagga).
apihelp-query+pageassessments-param-subp: Sidoo kale soo celi qiimeynta ay sameeyeen mashruucyada-hoosaadyadu
apihelp-query+pageassessments-example-fo: Hel xogta mashruuca iyo qiimeynta bogagga <kbd>Apple</kbd> iyo <kbd>Pear</kbd>, adigoo isticmaalaya qaabka natiijada API-ga ee cusub.
apihelp-query+pageassessments-example-si: Hel xogta mashruuca iyo qiimeynta bogga <kbd>Apple</kbd>.
apihelp-query+pageassessments-example-su: Hel xogta mashruuca iyo qiimeynta (oo ay ku jiraan kuwa mashruucyada-hoosaadyada) ee bogga <kbd>Apple</kbd>.
apihelp-query+projectpages-summary: Liis garee dhammaan bogagga la xiriira hal ama ka badan mashruuc.
apihelp-query+projectpages-param-assessm: Sidoo kale soo celi qiimeynta bogagga la soo celiyay.
apihelp-query+projectpages-param-project: Mashruucyada lagu liis gareynayo bogagga. Haddii halbeeggan la reebo, dhammaan mashruucyada ayaa la soo dari doonaa.
apihelp-query+projectpages-param-limit: Tirada ugu badan ee bogagga la soo celinayo.
apihelp-query+projectpages-example-simpl: Hel 10-ka bog ee ugu horreeya ee la xiriira WikiProject <kbd>Medicine</kbd> ama WikiProject <kbd>Anatomy</kbd>.
Hel 10-ka bog ee ugu horreeya ee la xiriira WikiProject <kbd>Medicine</kbd>, adigoo ku daraya xogta qiimeynta.
apihelp-query+projectpages-example-gener: Hel xogta bogga ee 10-ka bog ee ugu horreeya ee la xiriira WikiProject <kbd>Textile Arts</kbd>.
apihelp-query+projects-example-subprojec: Hel liiska dhammaan mashruucyada iyo mashruucyada-hoosaadyada.
apiwarn-pageassessments-nogeneratorasses: Suurtagal ma aha in laga soo helo natiijooyinka qiimeynta bogagga <kbd>generator=projectpages</kbd>.
